narrative:
DRIVER
CHF leads H4 CSM at 100 versus D1 at 0, the single largest divergence in the dataset, flagged as the dominant short-term signal above all else, driven by SNB intervention rhetoric and risk-off medium regime alignment. USDCHF is the primary expression with D1 Strong Buy and H4 momentum at 65, but the EURUSD negative 0.87 correlation to USDCHF means EURUSD H4 Strong Sell confirms the CHF bid independently, and NZDUSD at negative 0.68 to USDCHF adds a secondary short. USD D1 CSM sits at 100 but H4 has faded to 0, so USDCHF longs carry D1 tailwind while NZD's H4 CSM surge to 82 creates direct friction on the short NZDUSD leg.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: GBPJPY CMP 53 with H4 at 68 accelerating, D1 rising from 42
Fading: EURUSD CMP 40 with D1 at 37 and falling, H4 stalling at 38

WATCH
BoJ commentary crosses affect USDJPY directly, D1 Buy momentum at 70 extends toward 145 if hawkish signals are ignored by markets again
US manufacturing follow-through data hits DXY, USDCAD D1 Strong Buy at 76 accelerates above current range on any beat
SNB language on intervention shifts EURCHF, CHF H4 CSM 100 collapses rapidly if SNB tone softens even marginally

themes.theme: US Dollar strength from strong manufacturing data and risk-off sentiment
Japanese Yen weakness despite BoJ hawkishness, undermined by strong USD and risk-off flows
Euro pressure from yield spread dynamics and USD strength
British Pound weakness from soft PMI data and Iran deal uncertainty
Emerging market volatility: IDR supported by BI hikes, INR at risk from CPI concerns
Swiss Franc supported by SNB intervention rhetoric and risk-off environment
Geopolitical risk premium: US-Iran deal uncertainty driving commodity volatility and safe-haven demand
Crude oil and commodity rally boosting CAD on export strength

key_observation: US Dollar rallying on dual support from strong PMI data and geopolitical risk-off flows amid US-Iran negotiation uncertainties. Strait of Hormuz toll system discussions creating energy security concerns, driving crude higher and equity market volatility lower. Risk assets retreating while safe havens USD, CHF benefit.
watch: US-Iran deal progression over next 24 hours; Strait of Hormuz toll negotiations outcome; upcoming UK Retail Sales and Japan CPI data; potential BoJ intervention rhetoric; crude oil technical levels near 80; equity market capitulation signals; emerging market central bank responses to volatility
